[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10000011 3
1 00011000 2
2 10101110 5
3 00000000 a
4 01010111 5
5 11110111 7
6 11101111 7
7 11011111 7

01 10 11101111 7 match 6
12 21 11111111 a
23 32 11111111 a
34 43 11111100 6
45 54 11111111 a
56 65 10110111 6
67 76 00111111 6
70 07 11111111 a

02 20 11110111 7 match 5
13 31 11101111 7 match 6
24 42 11011111 7 match 7
35 53 11111111 a
46 64 11011000 4
57 75 10111111 7
60 06 11110110 6
71 17 11111111 a

03 30 11101110 6
14 41 11111111 a
25 52 10110111 6
36 63 01111100 5
47 74 11111111 a
50 05 11110111 7 match 5
61 16 11111111 a
72 27 10111111 7
